task_completion.description: Load the Landsat multispectral TIFF into ESA SNAP Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Product Explorer panel in ESA SNAP Desktop shows 'landsat_multispectral' loaded as a product.
A band named 'spectral_mean' is visible under the Bands folder in the Product Explorer, or the Band Maths dialog is open configuring this band.
A band named 'spectral_variance' is visible under the Bands folder in the Product Explorer, or the Band Maths dialog is open configuring this band.

task_completion.description: Create a binary anomaly mask band named 'anomaly_flag' using the > 5000 threshold
task_completion.visual_evidence: A band named 'anomaly_flag' is visible in the Product Explorer, or the Band Maths dialog shows an expression applying the threshold (e.g., spectral_variance > 5000).

task_completion.description: Save the enriched product in BEAM-DIMAP format
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Product As' dialog saving the file as 'landsat_qa.dim' in /home/ga/snap_exports/, or a file manager/terminal showing this file exists.

task_completion.description: Export the anomaly_flag band as a GeoTIFF
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Export dialog saving 'anomaly_mask.tif' in /home/ga/snap_exports/, or a file manager/terminal showing this file exists.

task_completion.description: Document the findings in a plain-text quality report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'quality_report.txt' with the total number of pixels (3,326,628) and the number of anomalous pixels (0 or 0%).

integrity.description: The agent used the ESA SNAP Desktop GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SNAP graphical user interface (Product Explorer, Band Maths, Export menus) rather than exclusively using terminal commands like 'gpt'.

integrity.description: The agent actually configured the band math expressions in SNAP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Band Maths dialog is visible in at least some screenshots showing the mathematical expressions being entered for the virtual bands.

integrity.description: The agent created the text report based on actual analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen opening a text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or using terminal commands to write the report, and the numbers reflect the actual image properties rather than placeholder text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input image has exactly 3,326,628 total pixels. The maximum spectral variance across the 4 bands is approximately 3336.2. Therefore, applying the threshold of spectral_variance > 5000 results in exactly 0 anomalous pixels (0%). The quality report must reflect these specific numbers (3,326,628 total, 0 anomalous) to be fully correct.
